prs_created.description: Add tests for libspectrum_snap Z80 register accessors (tests 88-90)
Fix: zero-initialise libspectrum_creator struct in alloc
Add microdrive API tests (tests 88-90: write_protect, cartridge_len/data, mdr roundtrip)

checked_off_by_maintainer: Apply patch for CI typo fix + macOS autoreconf cleanup (applied as commit 24bfa0d)
Apply patch for new buffer tests (test_83, test_84) - applied as commit 0cee5e9
Apply patch to upgrade SourceForge URLs from http to https - applied as commit 03276e4
Apply patch for pkg.m4 update (applied as commit b35d447)
Apply patch for creator const-correctness (applied as commit f9c310a)
Apply patch for buffer realloc optimization + AC_C_CONST removal (applied as commits e7cd26e and 03e922f)
Creator tests PR (tests 85-87) merged as commit 094ae28
notes: No regular open issues in the repo. Workflow files (.github/workflows/) are protected. Past changes applied by maintainer directly to master: libxml2 CI removal (5367634), buffer tests (0251ad2), buffer byte arrays (e7030f4), CI typo fix (24bfa0d), buffer set/append tests (0cee5e9), HTTPS URLs (03276e4), pkg.m4 update (b35d447), creator const (f9c310a), stdatomic C23 fix (ec5e009), buffer realloc optimize (e7cd26e), remove AC_C_CONST (03e922f), creator API tests 85-87 (094ae28). Buffer functions fully tested (tests 77-84). Creator API tested (tests 85-87). Three open PRs: #15 snap Z80 register tests (88-90), #16 creator_alloc zero-init fix, #17 microdrive API tests (88-90). Note: PRs #15 and #17 both use test numbers 88-90; maintainer should rebase one after merging the other. Build: ./autogen.sh && ./configure --with-fake-glib && make. Tests: make check. Next runs: after PRs merged, consider tests for tape_accessors, IDE functions, snap non-register fields (custom_rom, pages, etc.).
